name: Codespace for Skills!
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && curl -fsSL https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | sudo apt-key add - && sudo apt-add-repository "deb https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y terraform
